parameters.query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS xero_contacts (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  company_id UUID NOT NULL,
  xero_contact_id TEXT UNIQUE,
  name TEXT,
  email TEXT,
  phone TEXT,
  is_customer BOOLEAN,
  is_vendor BOOLEAN,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
  raw_json JSONB
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS xero_accounts (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  company_id UUID NOT NULL,
  xero_account_id TEXT UNIQUE,
  code TEXT,
  name TEXT,
  type TEXT,
  class TEXT,
  bank_account_number TEXT,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(),
  raw_json JSONB
);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_xero_contact_id ON xero_contacts(xero_contact_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_xero_account_id ON xero_accounts(xero_account_id);

INSERT INTO xero_contacts (company_id, xero_contact_id, name, email, phone, is_customer, is_vendor, raw_json)
VALUES ('YOUR_COMPANY_ID', '={{$json["ContactID"]}}', '={{$json["Name"]}}', '={{$json["EmailAddress"]}}', '={{$json["Phones"][0]["PhoneNumber"] || ""}}', {{$json["IsCustomer"]}}, {{$json["IsSupplier"]}}, '{{JSON.stringify($json)}}'::jsonb)
ON CONFLICT (xero_contact_id)
DO UPDATE SET
  name = EXCLUDED.name,
  email = EXCLUDED.email,
  phone = EXCLUDED.phone,
  is_customer = EXCLUDED.is_customer,
  is_vendor = EXCLUDED.is_vendor,
  raw_json = EXCLUDED.raw_json,
  updated_at = NOW();

INSERT INTO xero_accounts (company_id, xero_account_id, code, name, type, class, bank_account_number, raw_json)
VALUES ('YOUR_COMPANY_ID', '={{$json["AccountID"]}}', '={{$json["Code"]}}', '={{$json["Name"]}}', '={{$json["Type"]}}', '={{$json["Class"]}}', '={{$json["BankAccountNumber"] || ""}}', '{{JSON.stringify($json)}}'::jsonb)
ON CONFLICT (xero_account_id)
DO UPDATE SET
  code = EXCLUDED.code,
  name = EXCLUDED.name,
  type = EXCLUDED.type,
  class = EXCLUDED.class,
  bank_account_number = EXCLUDED.bank_account_number,
  raw_json = EXCLUDED.raw_json,
  updated_at = NOW();
